<!doctype html>
<html lang="en-AU">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover,user-scalable=yes">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#102a43">
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="CRSA Reports">
  <link rel="manifest" href="manifest.webmanifest">
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="icons/icon-180.png">
  <title>CRSA Staff Report Forms</title>
  <style>
    :root{
      --navy:#102a43;--navy2:#173f5f;--blue:#1479b8;--blue2:#0e6396;
      --pale:#edf6fb;--bg:#f3f6f8;--card:#fff;--line:#cbd7e2;--ink:#172b3a;
      --muted:#607585;--danger:#b42318;--warning:#8a5d00;--success:#16794b;
      --shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(16,42,67,.10);--radius:14px;
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box}
    html{-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;scroll-behavior:smooth}
    body{margin:0;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);font:16px/1.45 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Arial,sans-serif;padding-bottom:calc(86px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))}
    button,input,select,textarea{font:inherit}
    button{touch-action:manipulation;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    .appHeader{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:20;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy),var(--navy2));color:#fff;padding:calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-top)) 16px 13px;box-shadow:0 2px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.18)}
    .headerInner{max-width:1180px;margin:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
    .brandMark{width:43px;height:43px;border-radius:11px;background:#fff;color:var(--navy);display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-1px;flex:0 0 auto}
    .brandText{min-width:0;flex:1}.brandText h1{font-size:19px;line-height:1.15;margin:0}.brandText p{font-size:12px;margin:3px 0 0;opacity:.82;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
    .saveState{font-size:11px;padding:5px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);white-space:nowrap}
    .stepNav{max-width:1180px;margin:12px auto 0;display:flex;gap:7px;overflow-x:auto;padding:0 16px 2px;scrollbar-width:none}.stepNav::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
    .stepBtn{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);background:transparent;color:#fff;border-radius:999px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap}.stepBtn.active{background:#fff;color:var(--navy)}
    main{max-width:1180px;margin:16px auto;padding:0 12px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.05fr) minmax(360px,.95fr);gap:16px;align-items:start}
    .panel{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius);box-shadow:var(--shadow);overflow:hidden}
    .panelHead{padding:18px 18px 10px}.panelHead h2{margin:0;color:var(--navy);font-size:21px}.panelHead p{margin:5px 0 0;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}
    .formBody{padding:0 16px 20px}
    .section{display:none}.section.active{display:block}
    .sectionTitle{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;margin:16px 0 8px;color:var(--blue);font-size:17px}.sectionTitle span{width:29px;height:29px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;background:var(--pale);font-size:13px}
    .grid2,.grid3{display:grid;gap:12px}.grid2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.grid3{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
    label{display:block;margin:13px 0 6px;font-size:14px;font-weight:750;color:#243e50}.hint{display:block;font-weight:400;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;margin-top:2px}
    input,select,textarea{width:100%;min-height:46px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;padding:11px 12px;background:#fff;color:var(--ink);outline:none;-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none}
    select{background-image:linear-gradient(45deg,transparent 50%,#607585 50%),linear-gradient(135deg,#607585 50%,transparent 50%);background-position:calc(100% - 18px) 20px,calc(100% - 13px) 20px;background-size:5px 5px,5px 5px;background-repeat:no-repeat;padding-right:34px}
    textarea{min-height:94px;resize:vertical}
    input:focus,select:focus,textarea:focus{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(20,121,184,.14)}
    .checkRow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:8px;margin-top:8px}
    .optionGroup{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:12px;background:#fbfdfe;margin-top:8px}
    .optionGroupTitle{font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:7px}
    .qtyRow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 92px;gap:9px;align-items:center;margin:8px 0}
    .qtyRow .checkPill{margin:0}
    .qtyRow input[type="number"]{min-height:42px;text-align:center}
    .referenceRow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(165px,215px);gap:9px;align-items:center;margin:8px 0}
    .referenceRow .checkPill{margin:0}
    .referenceRow select{min-height:44px}
    .otherText{margin-top:8px}
.checkPill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;padding:10px 11px;font-size:13px;background:#fff}.checkPill input{width:19px;height:19px;min-height:auto;margin:0;accent-color:var(--blue);-webkit-appearance:auto;appearance:auto}
    .repeatList{display:grid;gap:11px;margin-top:10px}.repeatCard{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:12px;background:#fbfdfe;position:relative}.repeatCard .removeBtn{position:absolute;right:9px;top:8px;width:32px;height:32px;border:0;border-radius:8px;background:#fff0ee;color:var(--danger);font-size:18px}.repeatCardTitle{font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);padding-right:38px;margin-bottom:3px}
    .btn{border:0;border-radius:10px;min-height:45px;padding:11px 14px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer}.btnPrimary{background:var(--blue);color:#fff}.btnPrimary:active{background:var(--blue2)}.btnSecondary{background:var(--pale);color:var(--navy)}.btnDanger{background:#fff0ee;color:var(--danger)}.btnGhost{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--navy)}.btnFull{width:100%}.addBtn{margin-top:10px}
    .photoInput{position:absolute;opacity:0;width:1px;height:1px;overflow:hidden}.photoButton{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;width:100%;min-height:48px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--pale);color:var(--navy);font-weight:800;cursor:pointer}
    .photoGrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:12px}.photoCard{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:11px;overflow:hidden;background:#fff;position:relative}.photoCard img{display:block;width:100%;height:150px;object-fit:cover}.photoCard input{border:0;border-top:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:0;min-height:42px;font-size:13px}.photoCard button{position:absolute;right:7px;top:7px;width:34px;height:34px;border:0;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(16,42,67,.82);color:#fff;font-size:17px}
    .signatureWrap{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:11px;overflow:hidden;background:#fff}.signatureCanvas{display:block;width:100%;height:180px;touch-action:none;background:linear-gradient(#fff,#fff) padding-box,repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 30px,#edf2f5 31px) border-box}.sigActions{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding:7px;background:#f8fafb}.sigActions button{border:0;background:transparent;color:var(--blue);font-weight:800;padding:7px}
    .sectionActions{display:flex;gap:9px;margin-top:20px}.sectionActions .btn{flex:1}
    .previewPanel{position:sticky;top:142px}.previewTools{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:0 16px 13px}.previewTools .btn{font-size:12px;min-height:39px;padding:9px 11px}
    .aiSetup{margin-top:14px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:11px;background:#f8fafb;overflow:hidden}
    .aiSetup summary{cursor:pointer;padding:13px 14px;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);list-style:none}
    .aiSetup summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
    .aiSetupBody{padding:0 14px 14px}
    .aiStatus{display:none;margin:0 16px 12px;padding:11px 12px;border-left:4px solid var(--blue);background:#eef8fd;color:#173f5f;border-radius:5px;font-size:13px}
    .aiStatus.show{display:block}
    .aiNarrative{margin-top:8px}
    .aiReference{margin-top:14px;padding:10px 12px;background:#f3f7fa;border-left:3px solid var(--navy);font-size:12px}
    .reportTypeNote{margin:10px 0 15px;padding:12px 13px;border-left:4px solid var(--formPurple);background:#f7f5ff;border-radius:6px;color:#39334d;font-size:13px;line-height:1.5}
    .standardPreamble{margin:16px 0 20px;padding:14px 16px;background:#f3f7fa;border-left:4px solid var(--navy);font-size:13px;line-height:1.55}
    .standardPreamble strong{display:block;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:4px}
    .typeSpecificSection.isHidden{display:none!important}
    .alert{display:none;margin:0 16px 12px;padding:11px 12px;border-left:4px solid #e2a71a;background:#fff8df;color:#624b00;border-radius:5px;font-size:13px}.alert.show{display:block}
    .reportPaper{background:#fff;margin:0 14px 18px;border:1px solid var(--line);min-height:650px;padding:28px;font:13px/1.55 Georgia,"Times New Roman",serif;color:#111;overflow-wrap:anywhere}
    .reportPlaceholder{color:var(--muted);font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Arial,sans-serif;text-align:center;padding:90px 10px}
    .reportHeader{display:flex;align-items:center;border-bottom:3px solid var(--navy);padding-bottom:12px;margin-bottom:18px;gap:14px}.reportLogo{width:76px;height:62px;object-fit:contain}.reportBrand{flex:1}.reportBrand h1{margin:0;color:var(--navy);font:800 18px/1.2 Arial,sans-serif}.reportBrand p{margin:3px 0 0;color:#48606f;font:11px/1.3 Arial,sans-serif}.reportTitle{text-align:center;color:var(--navy);font:bold 18px/1.25 Arial,sans-serif;margin:20px 0}.reportMeta{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:0 0 17px}.reportMeta th,.reportMeta td{border:1px solid #b9c5ce;padding:6px 8px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top}.reportMeta th{width:32%;background:#edf6fb;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--navy)}
    .reportPaper h2{font:bold 14px Arial,sans-serif;color:var(--navy);border-bottom:1px solid #aebdca;margin:20px 0 9px;padding-bottom:4px}.reportPaper h3{font:bold 12px Arial,sans-serif;color:#173f5f;margin:13px 0 5px}.reportPaper p{margin:0 0 8px}.reportPaper ul{margin:4px 0 10px;padding-left:20px}.reportPhotos{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:10px}.reportPhoto{break-inside:avoid;border:1px solid #ccd5dc;padding:5px}.reportPhoto img{width:100%;height:210px;object-fit:contain;background:#f5f5f5}.reportPhoto figcaption{font:10px/1.35 Arial,sans-serif;margin-top:4px}.reportSignature{width:220px;max-height:95px;object-fit:contain;object-position:left center;border-bottom:1px solid #222}.disclaimer{font-size:10px;color:#4d5961;margin-top:22px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid #ccd5dc}
    .bottomBar{position:fixed;z-index:30;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;padding:9px 12px calc(9px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-top:1px solid #d5dee5;display:none;gap:9px}.bottomBar .btn{flex:1}
    .toast{position:fixed;z-index:99;left:50%;bottom:calc(95px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);background:#172b3a;color:#fff;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:999px;font-size:13px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:.2s}.toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}
    .installNote{background:#eef8f2;border:1px solid #badfca;border-radius:10px;padding:11px 12px;font-size:13px;color:#195f3e;margin-top:13px}
    @media(max-width:880px){body{padding-bottom:calc(78px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))}.appHeader{position:relative}.saveState{display:none}.stepNav{padding:0 0 2px}.stepNavWrap{background:var(--navy);padding-bottom:11px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:19}.headerInner{padding:0}.stepNav{margin-top:0}.stepBtn{color:#fff}.stepBtn.active{color:var(--navy)}main{display:block;margin:0;padding:12px}.previewPanel{position:static;margin-top:14px;display:none}.previewPanel.mobileShow{display:block}.bottomBar{display:flex}.grid3{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.reportPaper{padding:18px;margin:0 10px 15px}.previewPanel .panelHead{padding-top:15px}}
    @media(max-width:520px){.grid2,.grid3{grid-template-columns:1fr}.checkRow{grid-template-columns:1fr}.referenceRow{grid-template-columns:1fr}.photoGrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.photoCard img{height:210px}.reportPhotos{grid-template-columns:1fr}.reportPhoto img{height:auto;max-height:320px}.sectionActions{position:sticky;bottom:74px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.96);margin:18px -16px -20px;padding:10px 16px calc(10px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));border-top:1px solid #e0e7ec;z-index:10}.sectionActions .btn{min-width:0;padding-left:8px;padding-right:8px}.reportHeader{align-items:flex-start}.reportLogo{width:62px;height:50px}}
    @page{size:A4;margin:13mm}
    @media print{body{background:#fff;padding:0}.appHeader,.stepNavWrap,.formPanel,.previewTools,.panelHead,.alert,.bottomBar,.toast{display:none!important}main{display:block;max-width:none;margin:0;padding:0}.previewPanel{display:block!important;position:static;box-shadow:none}.panel{box-shadow:none;border-radius:0}.reportPaper{border:0;margin:0;padding:0;min-height:0;font-size:10.5pt}.reportPhotos{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.reportPhoto img{height:210px}.reportPaper h2{break-after:avoid}.reportPhoto,.reportMeta,.reportSignature{break-inside:avoid}}

    /* Jotform-style mobile workflow */
    :root{--formPurple:#5b46d6;--formPurpleDark:#4634b7;--formLav:#f0edff;--formBg:#f5f4fa}
    body{background:var(--formBg);padding-bottom:calc(92px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))}
    .appHeader{position:relative;background:#fff;color:var(--ink);box-shadow:none;border-bottom:1px solid #e4e1ef;padding:calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-top)) 16px 12px}
    .brandMark{background:var(--formPurple);color:#fff;border-radius:10px}.brandText h1{font-size:18px}.brandText p{color:var(--muted);opacity:1}.saveState{color:var(--success);background:#eaf7f0;border:1px solid #c5e7d4}
    .formProgressShell{background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #e4e1ef;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:18}
    .formProgressInner{max-width:780px;margin:auto;padding:12px 16px;position:relative}.progressMeta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:7px}.progressMeta strong{color:var(--formPurple)}
    .progressTrack{height:8px;background:#e9e6f4;border-radius:999px;overflow:hidden}.progressFill{height:100%;width:16.666%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--formPurple),#7a66ed);border-radius:999px;transition:width .25s ease}
    .staffActions{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:11px}.miniBtn{border:1px solid #ddd8ee;background:#fff;color:#403b52;border-radius:8px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:750}.countBadge{display:inline-grid;place-items:center;min-width:19px;height:19px;padding:0 5px;border-radius:99px;background:var(--formLav);color:var(--formPurple);font-size:10px;margin-left:3px}
    .stepNavWrap{display:none}
    main{display:block;max-width:780px;margin:22px auto 40px;padding:0 14px}.panel{box-shadow:0 10px 35px rgba(48,39,88,.10);border:1px solid #e8e5f1;border-radius:16px}.formPanel{overflow:visible}.panelHead{padding:24px 24px 8px}.panelHead h2{font-size:25px;color:#28243a;margin-top:7px}.panelHead p{font-size:14px}.formBadge{display:inline-block;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--formPurple);background:var(--formLav);border-radius:999px;padding:5px 8px}
    .formBody{padding:0 24px 26px}.sectionTitle{display:none}.section{animation:pageIn .22s ease}@keyframes pageIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
    label{font-size:15px;color:#29263a;margin-top:18px}.requiredMark{color:#d92d20}.hint{font-size:12px;color:#716c80}
    input,select,textarea{border:1.5px solid #d8d4e3;border-radius:10px;background:#fff;min-height:50px;padding:12px 13px}textarea{min-height:105px}input:focus,select:focus,textarea:focus{border-color:var(--formPurple);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(91,70,214,.12)}
    input.fieldError,select.fieldError,textarea.fieldError{border-color:#d92d20;background:#fff8f7;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(217,45,32,.08)}.fieldErrorMessage{color:#b42318;font-size:12px;margin-top:5px}
    .checkPill{border:1.5px solid #d8d4e3;border-radius:10px}.checkPill:has(input:checked){border-color:var(--formPurple);background:var(--formLav)}.checkPill input{accent-color:var(--formPurple)}
    .conditionalGroup{margin-top:17px;padding:13px;border:1px solid #ddd8ee;border-radius:12px;background:#faf9ff}.conditionalGroup.isHidden{display:none}.conditionalLabel{font-size:11px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--formPurple);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px}
    .repeatCard{border:1.5px solid #ddd8e8;background:#fbfaff;border-radius:13px}.repeatCardTitle{color:#39334d}.addBtn,.photoButton{background:var(--formLav);color:var(--formPurple);border:1px dashed #a69be4}
    .btn{border-radius:9px}.btnPrimary{background:var(--formPurple)}.btnPrimary:active{background:var(--formPurpleDark)}.btnSecondary{background:#f0eef5;color:#39334d}.btnGhost{border-color:#d8d4e3;color:#39334d}.sectionActions{justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid #ece9f2;padding-top:18px;margin-top:28px}.sectionActions .btn{flex:0 0 auto;min-width:130px}.sectionActions .nextBtn,#generateBtn{margin-left:auto}
    .previewPanel{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:80;border-radius:0;overflow:auto;background:#f1f0f5}.previewPanel.mobileShow{display:block}.previewPanel .panelHead{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:3;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #dedbe8}.previewTools{position:sticky;top:90px;z-index:2;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #dedbe8;padding:10px 16px}.reportPaper{max-width:800px;margin:18px auto 40px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
    .modalBackdrop{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;background:rgba(28,25,38,.55);padding:16px;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center}.modalBackdrop.show{display:flex}.modalCard{background:#fff;border-radius:18px 18px 0 0;width:min(720px,100%);max-height:88vh;overflow:auto;box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}.modalHead{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:15px;padding:22px;border-bottom:1px solid #ece9f2}.modalHead h2{margin:7px 0 3px}.modalHead p{margin:0;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}.iconClose{width:39px;height:39px;border:0;background:#f0eef5;border-radius:50%;font-size:25px;color:#403b52}.savedReportsList{padding:12px 18px 20px}.savedEmpty{text-align:center;padding:45px 15px;color:var(--muted)}.savedCard{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:10px;padding:14px 4px;border-bottom:1px solid #ece9f2}.savedCard h3{margin:0 0 4px;font-size:15px;color:#29263a}.savedCard p{margin:0;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px}.savedCardActions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}.savedCardActions button{border:0;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:750}.loadSaved{background:var(--formLav);color:var(--formPurple)}.deleteSaved{background:#fff0ee;color:#b42318}.modalFoot{padding:12px 18px 18px;text-align:right}
    .bottomBar{display:none}.toast{bottom:calc(105px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))}
    @media(max-width:880px){.formProgressShell{top:0}.formProgressInner{padding:10px 14px}.progressMeta{margin-bottom:6px}.staffActions{margin-top:9px}main{padding:0 10px;margin:12px auto 24px}.panel{border-radius:13px}.panelHead{padding:20px 18px 7px}.panelHead h2{font-size:22px}.formBody{padding:0 17px 24px}.grid2,.grid3{grid-template-columns:1fr}.checkRow{grid-template-columns:1fr}.sectionActions{display:none}.bottomBar{display:flex}.bottomBar .btn{min-width:0;padding:10px 8px}.photoGrid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.modalBackdrop{padding:0}.modalCard{width:100%}}
    @media(min-width:881px){.staffActions{position:absolute;right:16px;bottom:-46px;z-index:2}.formProgressInner{padding-bottom:14px}main{margin-top:54px}}
    @media print{.formProgressShell,.modalBackdrop{display:none!important}.previewPanel{position:static!important;display:block!important;background:#fff;overflow:visible}.reportPaper{box-shadow:none;margin:0}}

  </style>
</head>
<body>
<img id="embeddedDefaultLogo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="CRSA logo" style="display:none">
  <header class="appHeader">
    <div class="headerInner">
      <div class="brandMark"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Cleaning & Restoration Services Australia" style="max-width:100%;height:auto;display:block"></div>
      <div class="brandText"><h1>CRSA Staff Report Forms</h1><p>Mobile inspections and restoration reports</p></div>
      <div class="saveState" id="saveState">Saved locally</div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <section class="formProgressShell" aria-label="Form progress">
    <div class="formProgressInner">
      <div class="progressMeta"><span id="progressStep">Page 1 of 6</span><strong id="progressPercent">17% complete</strong></div>
      <div class="progressTrack"><div id="progressFill" class="progressFill"></div></div>
      <div class="staffActions">
        <button type="button" class="miniBtn" id="saveDraftTop">Save draft</button>
        <button type="button" class="miniBtn" id="savedReportsBtn">Saved reports <span id="savedCount" class="countBadge">0</span></button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
  <div class="stepNavWrap">
    <nav class="stepNav" aria-label="Report sections">
      <button class="stepBtn active" data-step="0">1. Job</button>
      <button class="stepBtn" data-step="1">2. Cause</button>
      <button class="stepBtn" data-step="2">3. Findings</button>
      <button class="stepBtn" data-step="3">4. Actions</button>
      <button class="stepBtn" data-step="4">5. Photos</button>
      <button class="stepBtn" data-step="5">6. Sign-off</button>
    </nav>
  </div>

  <main>
    <section class="panel formPanel">
      <div class="panelHead"><div class="formBadge">CRSA FORM</div><h2 id="pageHeading">Job and attendance</h2><p id="pageHelp">Complete the required details, then continue to the next page.</p></div>
      <form id="reportForm" class="formBody" autocomplete="on">
        <section class="section active" data-section="0">
          <div class="sectionTitle"><span>1</span>Job and attendance</div>
          <div class="grid2">
            <div>
              <label for="reportType">Report type</label>
              <select id="reportType">
                <option>Initial Assessment Report</option>
                <option>Water Damage Report</option>
                <option>Mould Assessment Report</option>
                <option>Fire and Smoke Damage Report</option>
                <option>Re-attendance Report</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div><label for="jobNumber">CRSA job number <span class="requiredMark">*</span></label><input id="jobNumber" data-required-step="0" placeholder="e.g. CRSA-2026-00123"></div>
          </div>

          <div id="reportFocusWrap" class="typeSpecificSection isHidden">
            <label for="reportFocus">Report relates to</label>
            <select id="reportFocus">
              <option>Water damage</option>
              <option>Mould / microbial</option>
              <option>Fire and smoke</option>
              <option>Water and mould</option>
              <option>General / other</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div id="reattendanceNote" class="reportTypeNote isHidden">
            Client, property and claim details have already been captured in the original job file. Only the CRSA job number and the new attendance details are required for this re-attendance report.
          </div>

          <div id="clientJobDetails">
            <label for="property">Property address / claim reference <span class="requiredMark">*</span></label><textarea id="property" data-required-step="0" placeholder="Unit, street, suburb, state and postcode"></textarea>
            <div class="grid2">
              <div><label for="insured">Insured / client name</label><input id="insured" placeholder="Full name"></div>
              <div><label for="claim">Insurance claim number</label><input id="claim" placeholder="Claim reference"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="grid2">
              <div><label for="insurer">Insurer / referring client</label><input id="insurer" placeholder="Company"></div>
              <div><label for="workOrder">Work order number</label><input id="workOrder" placeholder="Reference"></div>
            </div>
            <label for="buildingType">Building type</label>
            <select id="buildingType">
              <option value="">Select building type</option>
              <option>Single-storey house</option>
              <option>Double-storey house</option>
              <option>Unit / apartment</option>
              <option>Townhouse</option>
              <option>Other</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="grid3">
            <div><label for="date">Attendance date <span class="requiredMark">*</span></label><input id="date" type="date" data-required-step="0"></div>
            <div><label for="arrival">Arrival time</label><input id="arrival" type="time"></div>
            <div><label for="departure">Departure time</label><input id="departure" type="time"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="grid2">
            <div><label for="tech">Attending technician <span class="requiredMark">*</span></label><input id="tech" data-required-step="0" placeholder="Technician name"></div>
            <div><label for="clientAttendance">Client in attendance?</label><select id="clientAttendance"><option>Yes</option><option>No</option><option>Part of attendance</option><option>Not confirmed</option></select></div>
          </div>
          <label>Technician qualifications</label>
          <div class="optionGroup" id="qualificationOptions">
            <div class="checkRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualWRT">IICRC WRT</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualAMRT">IICRC AMRT</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualFSRT">IICRC FSRT</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualASD">IICRC ASD</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualCCT">IICRC CCT</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualOCT">IICRC OCT</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualCDS">IICRC CDS</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualHST">IICRC HST</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualRRT">IICRC RRT</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualCRT">IICRC CRT</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualMasterWater">IICRC Master Water Restorer</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualMasterFire">IICRC Master Fire and Smoke Restorer</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualMasterCleaning">IICRC Master Cleaning Technician</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualRIAWLS">RIA Water Loss Specialist</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="qualOther">Other</label>
            </div>
            <input id="qualOtherText" class="otherText" placeholder="Enter other technician qualification">
          </div>
          <div id="clientContactDetails">
            <label for="clientDetails">People present / contact details <span class="hint">Record who supplied information during the inspection.</span></label><textarea id="clientDetails" placeholder="Name, role and contact details"></textarea>
          </div>
          <div class="installNote"><strong>Staff workspace:</strong> drafts and saved reports remain on this iPhone unless they are exported or your hosted version is connected to a central database.</div>
          <div class="sectionActions"><button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary" disabled>Back</button><button type="button" class="btn btnPrimary nextBtn">Next: Cause</button></div>
        </section>

        <section class="section" data-section="1">
          <div class="sectionTitle"><span>2</span>Cause and classification</div>
          <div id="instructionsField">
            <label id="instructionsLabel" for="instructions">Instructions received</label><textarea id="instructions" placeholder="Further to instructions received from..."></textarea>
          </div>
          <label for="lossType">Type of loss</label><select id="lossType"><option>Water ingress</option><option>Escape of liquid</option><option>Storm / rainwater ingress</option><option>Sewage / contaminated water</option><option>Mould / microbial contamination</option><option>Fire / smoke</option><option>Other</option></select>
          <div id="sourceCauseField">
            <label id="sourceLabel" for="source">Reported source and cause <span class="requiredMark" id="sourceRequiredMark">*</span> <span class="hint">State who supplied the information, whether the cause was visually confirmed, and whether it has been rectified.</span></label><textarea id="source" data-required-step="1" placeholder="The insured advised... A plumber reportedly identified... The source was / was not rectified at the time of attendance..."></textarea>
          </div>
          <div class="conditionalGroup" id="waterClassFields">
          <div class="conditionalLabel">Water-loss classification</div>
          <div class="grid2">
            <div><label for="category">Water category</label><select id="category"><option value="">Not applicable / select</option><option value="1">Category 1</option><option value="2">Category 2</option><option value="3">Category 3</option><option value="Unconfirmed">Unconfirmed</option></select></div>
            <div><label for="lossClass">Class of water loss</label><select id="lossClass"><option value="">Not applicable / select</option><option value="1">Class 1</option><option value="2">Class 2</option><option value="3">Class 3</option><option value="4">Class 4</option><option value="Unconfirmed">Unconfirmed</option></select></div>
          </div></div>
          <div class="grid2">
            <div><label for="dateLoss">Reported date of loss</label><input id="dateLoss" type="date"></div>
            <div><label for="sourceStatus">Source status</label><select id="sourceStatus"><option>Reportedly rectified</option><option>Not rectified</option><option>Unable to confirm</option><option>Ongoing / intermittent</option><option>Not applicable</option></select></div>
          </div>
          <label>Inspection methods used</label>
          <div class="checkRow">
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="methodVisual" checked>Visual inspection</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="methodThermal" checked>Thermal imaging</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="methodMoisture" checked>Moisture survey</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="methodOdour">Odour assessment</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="methodAir">Air / surface sampling</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="methodOther">Other testing</label>
          </div>
          <label for="limitations">Access limitations / exclusions</label><textarea id="limitations" placeholder="Areas not accessed, concealed cavities, stored contents, floor coverings, height restrictions, hazardous materials or other limitations"></textarea>
          <div class="sectionActions"><button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary prevBtn">Back</button><button type="button" class="btn btnPrimary nextBtn">Next: Findings</button></div>
        </section>

        <section class="section" data-section="2">
          <div class="sectionTitle"><span>3</span>Inspection findings</div>
          <p class="hint">Add each affected room or area separately. These will be formatted into the report.</p>
          <div id="areasList" class="repeatList"></div>
          <button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary btnFull addBtn" id="addArea">＋ Add affected area</button>
          <div id="waterMoistureSection" class="typeSpecificSection">
          <label>Dry reference readings</label>
          <div class="optionGroup" id="dryReferenceOptions">
            <label for="unaffectedArea">Unaffected area</label>
            <input id="unaffectedArea" placeholder="Room or location used for the dry reference">

            <div class="referenceRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="dryRefWallPlasterboard">Wall plasterboard</label>
              <select id="dryRefWallPlasterboardValue">
                <option value="">Select reading</option>
                <option>10% WME</option>
                <option>11% WME</option>
                <option>12% WME</option>
                <option>13% WME</option>
                <option>14% WME</option>
                <option>3% concrete</option>
                <option>3.5% concrete</option>
                <option>4% concrete</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="referenceRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="dryRefCeilingPlasterboard">Ceiling plasterboard</label>
              <select id="dryRefCeilingPlasterboardValue">
                <option value="">Select reading</option>
                <option>10% WME</option>
                <option>11% WME</option>
                <option>12% WME</option>
                <option>13% WME</option>
                <option>14% WME</option>
                <option>3% concrete</option>
                <option>3.5% concrete</option>
                <option>4% concrete</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="referenceRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="dryRefCabinetry">Cabinetry</label>
              <select id="dryRefCabinetryValue">
                <option value="">Select reading</option>
                <option>10% WME</option>
                <option>11% WME</option>
                <option>12% WME</option>
                <option>13% WME</option>
                <option>14% WME</option>
                <option>3% concrete</option>
                <option>3.5% concrete</option>
                <option>4% concrete</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="referenceRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="dryRefSkirting">Skirting board</label>
              <select id="dryRefSkirtingValue">
                <option value="">Select reading</option>
                <option>10% WME</option>
                <option>11% WME</option>
                <option>12% WME</option>
                <option>13% WME</option>
                <option>14% WME</option>
                <option>3% concrete</option>
                <option>3.5% concrete</option>
                <option>4% concrete</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="referenceRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="dryRefBasePlate">Timber base plate</label>
              <select id="dryRefBasePlateValue">
                <option value="">Select reading</option>
                <option>10% WME</option>
                <option>11% WME</option>
                <option>12% WME</option>
                <option>13% WME</option>
                <option>14% WME</option>
                <option>3% concrete</option>
                <option>3.5% concrete</option>
                <option>4% concrete</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="referenceRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="dryRefConcrete">Concrete</label>
              <select id="dryRefConcreteValue">
                <option value="">Select reading</option>
                <option>10% WME</option>
                <option>11% WME</option>
                <option>12% WME</option>
                <option>13% WME</option>
                <option>14% WME</option>
                <option>3% concrete</option>
                <option>3.5% concrete</option>
                <option>4% concrete</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="referenceRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="dryRefOther">Other material</label>
              <select id="dryRefOtherValue">
                <option value="">Select reading</option>
                <option>10% WME</option>
                <option>11% WME</option>
                <option>12% WME</option>
                <option>13% WME</option>
                <option>14% WME</option>
                <option>3% concrete</option>
                <option>3.5% concrete</option>
                <option>4% concrete</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <input id="dryRefOtherMaterial" class="otherText" placeholder="Describe other dry-reference material">

            <label for="nonInvasiveReadings">Non-invasive readings</label>
            <textarea id="nonInvasiveReadings" placeholder="Record non-invasive meter readings, locations, material and meter scale"></textarea>

            <label for="dryReference">Additional dry-reference notes</label>
            <textarea id="dryReference" placeholder="Add further dry-reference details, meter type, scale or limitations"></textarea>
          </div>

          <label for="elevatedReadings">Elevated readings summary</label>
          <textarea id="elevatedReadings" placeholder="Material, location, meter/scale and elevated reading"></textarea>
          </div>
          <div id="mouldObservationSection" class="typeSpecificSection">
          <label>Mould / microbial observations</label>
          <div class="optionGroup" id="mouldObservationOptions">
            <div class="checkRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="mouldVisibleGrowth">Visible growth (Condition 3)</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="mouldSettledSpores">Suspected settled spores (Condition 2)</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="mouldMVOC">Microbial volatile organic compound (mVOC) odour</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="mouldOther">Other observations</label>
            </div>
            <input id="mouldOtherText" class="otherText" placeholder="Describe other mould / microbial observations">
          </div>
          <label for="mouldFindings">Additional mould / microbial notes</label>
          <textarea id="mouldFindings" placeholder="Record extent, locations, contributing conditions and any limitations. Avoid identifying species without laboratory analysis."></textarea>
          </div>
          <label for="preExisting">Pre-existing damage / maintenance issues</label><textarea id="preExisting" placeholder="Describe separately from resultant damage, or enter None observed"></textarea>
          <label for="contents">Contents observations</label><textarea id="contents" placeholder="Affected contents, accessibility, relocation or specialist assessment requirements"></textarea>
          <div class="sectionActions"><button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary prevBtn">Back</button><button type="button" class="btn btnPrimary nextBtn">Next: Actions</button></div>
        </section>

        <section class="section" data-section="3">
          <div class="sectionTitle"><span>4</span>Actions and recommendations</div>
          <label>Immediate actions taken</label>
          <div class="optionGroup">
            <div class="checkRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionContainment">Establish containment</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionExtraction">Complete water extraction</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionRemoveCarpet">Remove affected carpet</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionRemoveUnderlay">Remove affected underlay</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionRemoveSmoothEdge">Remove affected smooth edge</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionRemovePlasterboard">Remove affected plasterboard</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionRemoveSkirting">Remove affected skirting board</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionRemoveBasePlate">Remove affected timber base plate</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionHEPA">HEPA vacuum and clean</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionAntimicrobial">Apply antimicrobial</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionStabilisation">Environmental stabilisation</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionDrying">Undertake structural drying</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionMonitor">Monitor and document drying</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionIEP">Hygienist / IEP assessment</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionPRV">Post-remediation verification</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionReinstate">Reinstate removed materials</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="actionOther">Other</label>
            </div>
            <input id="immediateActionsOther" class="otherText" placeholder="Describe other immediate actions taken">
          </div>
          <label for="immediateActions">Additional action notes</label>
          <textarea id="immediateActions" placeholder="Add details, locations, quantities or limitations"></textarea>

          <label>Equipment installed</label>
          <div class="optionGroup">
            <div class="qtyRow"><label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="eqAirMovers">Air movers</label><input id="qtyAirMovers" type="number" min="0" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="No."></div>
            <div class="qtyRow"><label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="eqDehumidifiers">Dehumidifiers</label><input id="qtyDehumidifiers" type="number" min="0" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="No."></div>
            <div class="qtyRow"><label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="eqAFD">Air filtration devices</label><input id="qtyAFD" type="number" min="0" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="No."></div>
            <div class="qtyRow"><label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="eqRCD">RCDs</label><input id="qtyRCD" type="number" min="0" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="No."></div>
            <div class="qtyRow"><label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="eqPowerLeads">Power leads</label><input id="qtyPowerLeads" type="number" min="0" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="No."></div>
          </div>
          <div id="equipmentList" class="repeatList"></div>
          <button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary btnFull addBtn" id="addEquipment">＋ Add other equipment</button>
          <label for="monitoring">Monitoring / drying notes</label><textarea id="monitoring" placeholder="Placement, operating conditions, target drying goal, monitoring frequency and access requirements"></textarea>

          <label>Recommended remediation / proposed scope <span class="requiredMark">*</span></label>
          <div class="optionGroup" id="scopeOptions">
            <div class="checkRow">
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeContainment">Establish containment</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeExtraction">Complete water extraction</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeRemoveCarpet">Remove affected carpet</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeRemoveUnderlay">Remove affected underlay</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeRemoveSmoothEdge">Remove affected smooth edge</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeRemovePlasterboard">Remove affected plasterboard</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeRemoveSkirting">Remove affected skirting board</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeRemoveBasePlate">Remove affected timber base plate</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeHEPA">HEPA vacuum and clean</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeAntimicrobial">Apply antimicrobial</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeStabilisation">Environmental stabilisation</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeDrying">Undertake structural drying</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeMonitor">Monitor and document drying</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeIEP">Hygienist / IEP assessment</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopePRV">Post-remediation verification</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeReinstate">Reinstate removed materials</label>
              <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" id="scopeOther">Other</label>
            </div>
            <input id="scopeOtherText" class="otherText" placeholder="Describe other recommended scope items">
          </div>
          <label for="scope">Additional scope details</label>
          <textarea id="scope" style="min-height:130px" placeholder="Add sequencing, quantities, locations, specialist trades, authority requirements and exclusions"></textarea>
          <label for="specialist">Further specialist assessment</label><textarea id="specialist" placeholder="Hygienist / IEP, plumber, electrician, engineer, asbestos assessment, builder, flooring specialist or other"></textarea>
          <label for="recommendation">Overall recommendation</label><textarea id="recommendation" placeholder="Recommended next action and priority"></textarea>
          <div class="sectionActions"><button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary prevBtn">Back</button><button type="button" class="btn btnPrimary nextBtn">Next: Photos</button></div>
        </section>

        <section class="section" data-section="4">
          <div class="sectionTitle"><span>5</span>Photographs</div>
          <p class="hint">On iPhone, choose “Take Photo” to use the camera. Large images are compressed before being stored in the draft.</p>
          <label class="photoButton" for="photoInput">📷 Take or select photographs</label>
          <input class="photoInput" id="photoInput" type="file" accept="image/*" capture="environment" multiple>
          <div id="photoGrid" class="photoGrid"></div>
          <label for="photoNotes">Additional photograph notes</label><textarea id="photoNotes" placeholder="Optional notes about photograph sequence or areas not photographed"></textarea>
          <div class="sectionActions"><button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary prevBtn">Back</button><button type="button" class="btn btnPrimary nextBtn">Next: Sign-off</button></div>
        </section>

        <section class="section" data-section="5">
          <div class="sectionTitle"><span>6</span>Conclusion and sign-off</div>
          <label for="conclusion">Conclusion</label><textarea id="conclusion" style="min-height:140px" placeholder="Summarise the observed damage, recommended action and any uncertainty or limitations"></textarea>
          <label for="authorName">Report prepared by <span class="requiredMark">*</span></label><input id="authorName" data-required-step="5" placeholder="Name and qualification">
          <div class="grid2">
            <div><label for="authorTitle">Position</label><input id="authorTitle" placeholder="e.g. Restoration Practitioner"></div>
            <div><label for="reportDate">Report date</label><input id="reportDate" type="date"></div>
          </div>
          <label>Technician signature</label>
          <div class="signatureWrap"><canvas id="signatureCanvas" class="signatureCanvas"></canvas><div class="sigActions"><button type="button" id="clearSignature">Clear signature</button></div></div>
          <label for="businessDetails">Business footer details</label><textarea id="businessDetails">Cleaning &amp; Restoration Services Australia (CRSA)&#10;Quality Over Quantity</textarea>
          <label class="photoButton" for="logoInput">🏢 Replace CRSA logo (optional)</label><input class="photoInput" id="logoInput" type="file" accept="image/*">

          <details class="aiSetup">
            <summary>✨ AI wording setup</summary>
            <div class="aiSetupBody">
              <label for="aiEndpoint">Secure AI service URL</label>
              <input id="aiEndpoint" type="url" inputmode="url" placeholder="https://your-secure-service.vercel.app/api/improve-report">
              <label for="aiAccessCode">Staff access code</label>
              <input id="aiAccessCode" type="password" autocomplete="off" placeholder="Enter the CRSA staff access code">
              <p class="hint">These settings are stored only on this device and are not included in exported report drafts. The OpenAI API key remains on the secure server.</p>
            </div>
          </details>

          <div class="sectionActions"><button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary prevBtn">Back</button><button type="button" class="btn btnPrimary" id="generateBtn">Generate report</button></div>
        </section>
      </form>
    </section>

    <section class="panel previewPanel" id="previewPanel">
      <div class="panelHead"><h2>Report preview</h2><p>Review every statement before issuing.</p></div>
      <div class="previewTools"><button type="button" class="btn btnGhost" id="closePreviewBtn">← Back to form</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btnPrimary" id="aiImproveBtn">✨ Improve wording with AI</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btnGhost" id="aiClearBtn" hidden>Use original wording</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btnPrimary" id="printBtn">Print / PDF</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary" id="shareBtn">Share</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary" id="copyBtn">Copy text</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btnGhost" id="exportBtn">Export draft</button>
        <button type="button" class="btn btnGhost" id="importBtn">Import draft</button>
        <input id="importFile" type="file" accept="application/json,.json" hidden>
        <button type="button" class="btn btnDanger" id="newBtn">New report</button>
      </div>
      <div id="alert" class="alert"></div>
      <div id="aiStatus" class="aiStatus"></div>
      <article id="report" class="reportPaper"><div class="reportPlaceholder">Complete the assessment and select “Generate report”.</div></article>
    </section>
  </main>


  <div class="modalBackdrop" id="savedReportsModal" aria-hidden="true">
    <section class="modalCard" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="savedReportsTitle">
      <div class="modalHead"><div><div class="formBadge">STAFF RECORDS</div><h2 id="savedReportsTitle">Saved reports</h2><p>Reports are stored on this device until exported or removed.</p></div><button type="button" class="iconClose" id="closeSavedReports" aria-label="Close">×</button></div>
      <div id="savedReportsList" class="savedReportsList"></div>
      <div class="modalFoot"><button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary" id="closeSavedReportsBottom">Close</button></div>
    </section>
  </div>

  <div class="bottomBar">
    <button type="button" class="btn btnSecondary" id="mobileBackBtn">Back</button>
    <button type="button" class="btn btnGhost" id="mobileSaveBtn">Save</button>
    <button type="button" class="btn btnPrimary" id="mobileNextBtn">Continue</button>
  </div>
  <div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

  <script>
const CRSA_DEFAULT_LOGO = "data:image/png;base64,";

    const STORAGE_KEY='crsaReportBuilderV3';
    const REPORTS_KEY='crsaSubmittedReportsV1';
    const AI_ENDPOINT_KEY='crsaAiEndpointV1';
    const AI_ACCESS_KEY='crsaAiAccessCodeV1';
    const $=s=>document.querySelector(s); const $$=s=>[...document.querySelectorAll(s)];
    let currentStep=0, photos=[], logoData=CRSA_DEFAULT_LOGO, signatureData='', saveTimer, lastReportText='', currentSubmissionId='', aiNarratives={};
    const fieldIds=['reportType','reportFocus','jobNumber','property','insured','claim','insurer','workOrder','buildingType','date','arrival','departure','tech','clientAttendance','clientDetails','instructions','lossType','source','category','lossClass','dateLoss','sourceStatus','limitations','unaffectedArea','dryRefWallPlasterboardValue','dryRefCeilingPlasterboardValue','dryRefCabinetryValue','dryRefSkirtingValue','dryRefBasePlateValue','dryRefConcreteValue','dryRefOtherValue','dryRefOtherMaterial','nonInvasiveReadings','dryReference','elevatedReadings','mouldFindings','preExisting','contents','immediateActions','immediateActionsOther','mouldOtherText','qualOtherText','qtyAirMovers','qtyDehumidifiers','qtyAFD','qtyRCD','qtyPowerLeads','monitoring','scope','scopeOtherText','specialist','recommendation','photoNotes','conclusion','authorName','authorTitle','reportDate','businessDetails'];
    const checkIds=['methodVisual','methodThermal','methodMoisture','methodOdour','methodAir','methodOther',
      'dryRefWallPlasterboard','dryRefCeilingPlasterboard','dryRefCabinetry','dryRefSkirting','dryRefBasePlate','dryRefConcrete','dryRefOther',
      'mouldVisibleGrowth','mouldSettledSpores','mouldMVOC','mouldOther',
      'actionContainment','actionExtraction','actionRemoveCarpet','actionRemoveUnderlay','actionRemoveSmoothEdge','actionRemovePlasterboard','actionRemoveSkirting','actionRemoveBasePlate','actionHEPA','actionAntimicrobial','actionStabilisation','actionDrying','actionMonitor','actionIEP','actionPRV','actionReinstate','actionOther',
      'eqAirMovers','eqDehumidifiers','eqAFD','eqRCD','eqPowerLeads',
      'scopeContainment','scopeExtraction','scopeRemoveCarpet','scopeRemoveUnderlay','scopeRemoveSmoothEdge','scopeRemovePlasterboard','scopeRemoveSkirting','scopeRemoveBasePlate','scopeHEPA','scopeAntimicrobial','scopeStabilisation','scopeDrying','scopeMonitor','scopeIEP','scopePRV','scopeReinstate','scopeOther',
      'qualWRT','qualAMRT','qualFSRT','qualASD','qualCCT','qualOCT','qualCDS','qualHST','qualRRT','qualCRT','qualMasterWater','qualMasterFire','qualMasterCleaning','qualRIAWLS','qualOther'];
    const esc=s=>String(s??'').replace(/[&<>"']/g,m=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#039;'}[m]));
    const nl=s=>esc(s).replace(/\n/g,'<br>');
    const val=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value.trim()||'';
    const formatDate=s=>s?new Date(s+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-AU',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}):'';
    const today=()=>new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
    const showToast=message=>{const t=$('#toast');t.textContent=message;t.classList.add('show');setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),1800)};

    const pageTitles=['Job and attendance','Cause and classification','Inspection findings','Actions and recommendations','Photographs','Conclusion and sign-off'];
    const pageHelp=['Enter the job, property and attendance details.','Record the reported cause, source status and inspection methods.','Document each affected room, material and moisture finding.','Record work completed, equipment and the recommended scope.','Add inspection photographs and clear captions.','Review the conclusion, identify the author and sign the report.'];
    function showStep(step){
      currentStep=Math.max(0,Math.min(5,Number(step)));
      $$('.section').forEach((el,i)=>el.classList.toggle('active',i===currentStep));
      $$('.stepBtn').forEach((el,i)=>el.classList.toggle('active',i===currentStep));
      const pct=Math.round(((currentStep+1)/6)*100);
      $('#progressStep').textContent=`Page ${currentStep+1} of 6`;
      $('#progressPercent').textContent=`${pct}% complete`;
      $('#progressFill').style.width=`${pct}%`;
      $('#pageHeading').textContent=pageTitles[currentStep];
      $('#pageHelp').textContent=pageHelp[currentStep];
      $('#mobileBackBtn').disabled=currentStep===0;
      $('#mobileNextBtn').textContent=currentStep===5?'Generate report':'Continue';
      $$('.stepBtn')[currentStep]?.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest',inline:'center'});
      window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});
      toggleConditionals();
    }
    function clearFieldErrors(){
      $$('.fieldError').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('fieldError'));
      $$('.fieldErrorMessage').forEach(el=>el.remove());
    }
    function validateStep(step=currentStep){
      clearFieldErrors();
      const fields=$$(`[data-required-step="${step}"]`);
      let valid=true, first=null;

      fields.forEach(el=>{
        if(el.closest('.isHidden'))return;
        const fieldValue=typeof el.value==='string'?el.value.trim():'';
        if(!fieldValue){
          valid=false;
          first=first||el;
          el.classList.add('fieldError');
          const m=document.createElement('div');
          m.className='fieldErrorMessage';
          m.textContent='This field is required.';
          el.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',m);
        }
      });

      if(step===2&&!collectAreas().some(a=>
        a.name||a.findings||a.materials||a.materialsOther||
        a.matWallPlasterboard||a.matCeilingPlasterboard||a.matCabinetry||a.matSkirting||a.matBasePlate||a.matOther||
        a.damageSwelling||a.damageWaterStaining||a.damageBubbling||a.damageSmokeSoot||a.damageVisualMicrobial||a.damageSettledDust||a.damageOther||
        a.moistureTaken||a.moistureStandard||a.readings
      )){
        valid=false;
        showToast('Add at least one affected area or finding');
      }

      if(step===3&&!selectedScope().length){
        valid=false;
        const scopeBox=$('#scopeOptions');
        first=first||scopeBox;
        scopeBox?.classList.add('fieldError');
        if(scopeBox&&!scopeBox.nextElementSibling?.classList.contains('fieldErrorMessage')){
          const m=document.createElement('div');
          m.className='fieldErrorMessage';
          m.textContent='Select at least one recommended scope item or enter additional scope details.';
          scopeBox.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',m);
        }
        showToast('Select at least one recommended scope item');
      }

      if(!valid&&first){
        first.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'});
        if(typeof first.focus==='function')setTimeout(()=>first.focus(),250);
      }
      return valid;
    }
    function isReattendance(){
      return val('reportType')==='Re-attendance Report';
    }

    function reportFocusValue(){
      const type=val('reportType');
      if(type==='Water Damage Report')return 'Water damage';
      if(type==='Mould Assessment Report')return 'Mould / microbial';
      if(type==='Fire and Smoke Damage Report')return 'Fire and smoke';
      return val('reportFocus')||'General / other';
    }

    function usesWaterWorkflow(){
      const focus=reportFocusValue().toLowerCase();
      return /water/.test(focus);
    }

    function usesMouldWorkflow(){
      const focus=reportFocusValue().toLowerCase();
      return /mould|microbial/.test(focus);
    }

    function usesFireWorkflow(){
      const focus=reportFocusValue().toLowerCase();
      return /fire|smoke/.test(focus);
    }

    function setRequiredStep(el,step,required){
      if(!el)return;
      if(required)el.setAttribute('data-required-step',String(step));
      else el.removeAttribute('data-required-step');
    }

    function updateReportTypeUI(applyDefaults=false){
      const type=val('reportType');
      const reattendance=type==='Re-attendance Report';
      const showFocus=type==='Initial Assessment Report'||reattendance;

      $('#reportFocusWrap')?.classList.toggle('isHidden',!showFocus);
      $('#reattendanceNote')?.classList.toggle('isHidden',!reattendance);
      $('#clientJobDetails')?.classList.toggle('isHidden',reattendance);
      $('#clientContactDetails')?.classList.toggle('isHidden',reattendance);

      setRequiredStep($('#property'),0,!reattendance);
      setRequiredStep($('#source'),1,!reattendance);
      $('#sourceRequiredMark')?.classList.toggle('isHidden',reattendance);

      if(reattendance){
        $('#instructionsLabel').textContent='Purpose of re-attendance';
        $('#instructions').placeholder='Monitoring visit, equipment adjustment, further inspection, remediation progress or other purpose';
        $('#sourceLabel').childNodes[0].nodeValue='Previous loss / reported cause ';
        $('#source').placeholder='Optional. Refer to the original report or record any updated information about the cause.';
      }else{
        $('#instructionsLabel').textContent='Instructions received';
        $('#instructions').placeholder='Further to instructions received from...';
        $('#sourceLabel').childNodes[0].nodeValue='Reported source and cause ';
        $('#source').placeholder='The insured advised... A plumber reportedly identified... The source was / was not rectified at the time of attendance...';
      }

      if(applyDefaults){
        if(type==='Water Damage Report')$('#lossType').value='Water ingress';
        if(type==='Mould Assessment Report')$('#lossType').value='Mould / microbial contamination';
        if(type==='Fire and Smoke Damage Report')$('#lossType').value='Fire / smoke';
        if(type==='Initial Assessment Report'&&!val('reportFocus'))$('#reportFocus').value='Water damage';
        if(reattendance&&!val('reportFocus'))$('#reportFocus').value='Water damage';
        aiNarratives={};
        updateAiControls();
      }

      const genericInitial=type==='Initial Assessment Report'&&reportFocusValue()==='General / other';
      const showMoisture=usesWaterWorkflow()||usesMouldWorkflow()||genericInitial;
      const showMould=usesMouldWorkflow()||genericInitial;

      $('#waterMoistureSection')?.classList.toggle('isHidden',!showMoisture);
      $('#mouldObservationSection')?.classList.toggle('isHidden',!showMould);

      toggleConditionals();
      queueSave();
    }

    function toggleConditionals(){
      const type=val('lossType').toLowerCase();
      const waterLoss=/water|liquid|storm|sewage/.test(type);
      const showWaterClass=usesWaterWorkflow()||waterLoss;
      $('#waterClassFields')?.classList.toggle('isHidden',!showWaterClass);
    }
    $$('.stepBtn').forEach(btn=>btn.addEventListener('click',()=>showStep(btn.dataset.step)));
    $$('.nextBtn').forEach(btn=>btn.addEventListener('click',()=>{if(validateStep())showStep(currentStep+1)}));
    $$('.prevBtn').forEach(btn=>btn.addEventListener('click',()=>showStep(currentStep-1)));

    function createArea(data={}){
      const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='repeatCard areaCard';
      const uid=`area-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;
      card.innerHTML=`<button type="button" class="removeBtn" aria-label="Remove area">×</button><div class="repeatCardTitle">Affected area</div>
        <label>Room / area</label><input class="areaName" placeholder="e.g. Kitchen" value="${esc(data.name||'')}">

        <label>Materials and construction</label>
        <div class="optionGroup areaMaterialOptions">
          <div class="checkRow">
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="matWallPlasterboard">Wall plasterboard</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="matCeilingPlasterboard">Ceiling plasterboard</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="matCabinetry">Cabinetry</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="matSkirting">Skirting board</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="matBasePlate">Timber base plate</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="matOther">Other</label>
          </div>
          <input class="areaMaterialsOther otherText" placeholder="Other materials / construction" value="${esc(data.materialsOther||'')}">
        </div>
        <label>Additional material notes</label>
        <textarea class="areaMaterials" placeholder="Construction details, substrate, floor system or other notes">${esc(data.materials||'')}</textarea>

        <label>Observed damage</label>
        <div class="optionGroup areaDamageOptions">
          <div class="checkRow">
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="damageSwelling">Swelling</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="damageWaterStaining">Water staining</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="damageBubbling">Bubbling</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="damageSmokeSoot">Smoke and soot</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="damageVisualMicrobial">Visual microbial growth</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="damageSettledDust">Settled dust</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="damageOther">Other</label>
          </div>
          <input class="areaDamageOther otherText" placeholder="Describe other observed damage" value="${esc(data.damageOtherText||'')}">
        </div>
        <label>Additional damage / condition notes</label>
        <textarea class="areaFindings" placeholder="Add locations, extent, severity, odour, delamination or other condition details">${esc(data.findings||'')}</textarea>

        <label>Moisture readings</label>
        <div class="optionGroup areaMoistureOptions">
          <label class="checkPill"><input type="checkbox" class="moistureTaken">Moisture readings taken</label>
          <div class="checkRow moistureStandardOptions">
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="radio" class="moistureAbove" name="${uid}-moisture-standard" value="Above dry standard">Above dry standard</label>
            <label class="checkPill"><input type="radio" class="moistureBelow" name="${uid}-moisture-standard" value="Below dry standard">Below dry standard</label>
          </div>
        </div>
        <label>Moisture reading notes</label>
        <textarea class="areaReadings" placeholder="Location, material, meter type / scale and reading">${esc(data.readings||'')}</textarea>`;

      card.querySelector('.matWallPlasterboard').checked=!!(data.matWallPlasterboard??data.matPlasterboard);
      card.querySelector('.matCeilingPlasterboard').checked=!!data.matCeilingPlasterboard;
      card.querySelector('.matCabinetry').checked=!!data.matCabinetry;
      card.querySelector('.matSkirting').checked=!!data.matSkirting;
      card.querySelector('.matBasePlate').checked=!!data.matBasePlate;
      card.querySelector('.matOther').checked=!!data.matOther;

      card.querySelector('.damageSwelling').checked=!!data.damageSwelling;
      card.querySelector('.damageWaterStaining').checked=!!data.damageWaterStaining;
      card.querySelector('.damageBubbling').checked=!!data.damageBubbling;
      card.querySelector('.damageSmokeSoot').checked=!!data.damageSmokeSoot;
      card.querySelector('.damageVisualMicrobial').checked=!!data.damageVisualMicrobial;
      card.querySelector('.damageSettledDust').checked=!!data.damageSettledDust;
      card.querySelector('.damageOther').checked=!!data.damageOther;

      card.querySelector('.moistureTaken').checked=!!data.moistureTaken;
      if(data.moistureStandard==='Above dry standard')card.querySelector('.moistureAbove').checked=true;
      if(data.moistureStandard==='Below dry standard')card.querySelector('.moistureBelow').checked=true;

      card.querySelector('.removeBtn').onclick=()=>{card.remove();renumberCards('.areaCard','Affected area');queueSave()};
      $('#areasList').appendChild(card);renumberCards('.areaCard','Affected area');
    }
    function createEquipment(data={}){
      const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='repeatCard equipmentCard';
      card.innerHTML=`<button type="button" class="removeBtn" aria-label="Remove equipment">×</button><div class="repeatCardTitle">Equipment</div>
        <div class="grid3"><div><label>Type</label><select class="eqType"><option>Air mover</option><option>LGR dehumidifier</option><option>Desiccant dehumidifier</option><option>Air filtration device</option><option>HEPA air scrubber</option><option>Heater</option><option>Other</option></select></div><div><label>Quantity</label><input class="eqQty" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="1" value="${esc(data.qty||'')}"></div><div><label>Area</label><input class="eqArea" placeholder="Room" value="${esc(data.area||'')}"></div></div>
        <label>Equipment / serial notes</label><input class="eqNotes" placeholder="Optional ID, serial or placement notes" value="${esc(data.notes||'')}">`;
      card.querySelector('.eqType').value=data.type||'Air mover';
      card.querySelector('.removeBtn').onclick=()=>{card.remove();renumberCards('.equipmentCard','Equipment');queueSave()};
      $('#equipmentList').appendChild(card);renumberCards('.equipmentCard','Equipment');
    }
    function renumberCards(selector,label){$$(selector).forEach((card,i)=>card.querySelector('.repeatCardTitle').textContent=`${label} ${i+1}`)}
    $('#addArea').onclick=()=>{createArea();queueSave()}; $('#addEquipment').onclick=()=>{createEquipment();queueSave()};

    async function compressImage(file,maxDimension=1200,quality=.68){
      return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const reader=new FileReader();reader.onerror=reject;reader.onload=()=>{const img=new Image();img.onerror=reject;img.onload=()=>{let w=img.width,h=img.height;const scale=Math.min(1,maxDimension/Math.max(w,h));w=Math.round(w*scale);h=Math.round(h*scale);const c=document.createElement('canvas');c.width=w;c.height=h;c.getContext('2d').drawImage(img,0,0,w,h);resolve(c.toDataURL('image/jpeg',quality))};img.src=reader.result};reader.readAsDataURL(file)});
    }
    $('#photoInput').addEventListener('change',async e=>{for(const file of e.target.files){try{photos.push({src:await compressImage(file),caption:''})}catch{showToast(`Could not add ${file.name}`)}}renderPhotos();queueSave();e.target.value=''});
    $('#logoInput').addEventListener('change',async e=>{const file=e.target.files[0];if(file){try{logoData=await compressImage(file,700,.85);queueSave();showToast('Logo added')}catch{showToast('Could not add logo')}}e.target.value=''});
    function renderPhotos(){
      const grid=$('#photoGrid');grid.innerHTML='';photos.forEach((p,i)=>{const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='photoCard';card.innerHTML=`<img src="${p.src}" alt="Photograph ${i+1}"><button type="button" aria-label="Remove photo">×</button><input placeholder="Photo ${i+1} caption" value="${esc(p.caption||'')}">`;card.querySelector('button').onclick=()=>{photos.splice(i,1);renderPhotos();queueSave()};card.querySelector('input').oninput=e=>{photos[i].caption=e.target.value;queueSave()};grid.appendChild(card)})
    }

    const sigCanvas=$('#signatureCanvas'),sigCtx=sigCanvas.getContext('2d');let drawing=false,lastPoint=null;
    function resizeSignature(){const ratio=Math.max(window.devicePixelRatio||1,1),rect=sigCanvas.getBoundingClientRect(),old=signatureData;sigCanvas.width=Math.round(rect.width*ratio);sigCanvas.height=Math.round(rect.height*ratio);sigCtx.setTransform(ratio,0,0,ratio,0,0);sigCtx.lineWidth=2.2;sigCtx.lineCap='round';sigCtx.strokeStyle='#152a3a';if(old){const img=new Image();img.onload=()=>sigCtx.drawImage(img,0,0,rect.width,rect.height);img.src=old}}
    function point(e){const r=sigCanvas.getBoundingClientRect(),t=e.touches?.[0]||e;return{x:t.clientX-r.left,y:t.clientY-r.top}}
    function startDraw(e){e.preventDefault();drawing=true;lastPoint=point(e)}function moveDraw(e){if(!drawing)return;e.preventDefault();const p=point(e);sigCtx.beginPath();sigCtx.moveTo(lastPoint.x,lastPoint.y);sigCtx.lineTo(p.x,p.y);sigCtx.stroke();lastPoint=p}function endDraw(){if(!drawing)return;drawing=false;signatureData=sigCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');queueSave()}
    if(window.PointerEvent){
      sigCanvas.addEventListener('pointerdown',startDraw,{passive:false});
      sigCanvas.addEventListener('pointermove',moveDraw,{passive:false});
      sigCanvas.addEventListener('pointerup',endDraw);sigCanvas.addEventListener('pointercancel',endDraw);
    }else{
      sigCanvas.addEventListener('touchstart',startDraw,{passive:false});sigCanvas.addEventListener('touchmove',moveDraw,{passive:false});sigCanvas.addEventListener('touchend',endDraw);
      sigCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown',startDraw);sigCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove',moveDraw);sigCanvas.addEventListener('mouseup',endDraw);
    }
    $('#clearSignature').onclick=()=>{signatureData='';sigCtx.clearRect(0,0,sigCanvas.width,sigCanvas.height);queueSave()};

    function collectAreas(){return $$('.areaCard').map(c=>({
      name:c.querySelector('.areaName').value.trim(),

      materials:c.querySelector('.areaMaterials').value.trim(),
      materialsOther:c.querySelector('.areaMaterialsOther').value.trim(),
      matWallPlasterboard:c.querySelector('.matWallPlasterboard').checked,
      matCeilingPlasterboard:c.querySelector('.matCeilingPlasterboard').checked,
      matCabinetry:c.querySelector('.matCabinetry').checked,
      matSkirting:c.querySelector('.matSkirting').checked,
      matBasePlate:c.querySelector('.matBasePlate').checked,
      matOther:c.querySelector('.matOther').checked,

      damageSwelling:c.querySelector('.damageSwelling').checked,
      damageWaterStaining:c.querySelector('.damageWaterStaining').checked,
      damageBubbling:c.querySelector('.damageBubbling').checked,
      damageSmokeSoot:c.querySelector('.damageSmokeSoot').checked,
      damageVisualMicrobial:c.querySelector('.damageVisualMicrobial').checked,
      damageSettledDust:c.querySelector('.damageSettledDust').checked,
      damageOther:c.querySelector('.damageOther').checked,
      damageOtherText:c.querySelector('.areaDamageOther').value.trim(),
      findings:c.querySelector('.areaFindings').value.trim(),

      moistureTaken:c.querySelector('.moistureTaken').checked,
      moistureStandard:c.querySelector('input[type="radio"]:checked')?.value||'',
      readings:c.querySelector('.areaReadings').value.trim()
    }))}
    function collectEquipment(){return $$('.equipmentCard').map(c=>({type:c.querySelector('.eqType').value,qty:c.querySelector('.eqQty').value,area:c.querySelector('.eqArea').value,notes:c.querySelector('.eqNotes').value}))}
    function collectData(){const fields={};fieldIds.forEach(id=>fields[id]=document.getElementById(id).value);const checks={};checkIds.forEach(id=>checks[id]=document.getElementById(id).checked);return{version:9,submissionId:currentSubmissionId,fields,checks,areas:collectAreas(),equipment:collectEquipment(),photos,logoData,signatureData,aiNarratives,updated:new Date().toISOString()}}
    function applyData(data={}){
      currentSubmissionId=data.submissionId||'';
      const legacyChecks=data.checks||{};
      if(legacyChecks.actionCarpetRemoval)legacyChecks.actionRemoveCarpet=true;
      if(legacyChecks.actionUnderlayRemoval)legacyChecks.actionRemoveUnderlay=true;
      if(legacyChecks.actionSmoothEdgeRemoval)legacyChecks.actionRemoveSmoothEdge=true;
      const legacyReportTypes={
        'Preliminary Water Damage Assessment':'Water Damage Report',
        'Mould Assessment':'Mould Assessment Report',
        'Water and Mould Damage Assessment':'Initial Assessment Report',
        'Progress Report':'Re-attendance Report',
        'Completion Report':'Re-attendance Report'
      };
      fieldIds.forEach(id=>{if(data.fields&&id in data.fields)document.getElementById(id).value=data.fields[id]});
      if(legacyReportTypes[val('reportType')])$('#reportType').value=legacyReportTypes[val('reportType')];
      if(!val('reportFocus')){
        const original=data.fields?.reportType||'';
        if(/water and mould/i.test(original))$('#reportFocus').value='Water and mould';
        else if(/mould/i.test(original))$('#reportFocus').value='Mould / microbial';
        else if(/fire|smoke/i.test(original))$('#reportFocus').value='Fire and smoke';
        else $('#reportFocus').value='Water damage';
      }
      checkIds.forEach(id=>{if(id in legacyChecks)document.getElementById(id).checked=!!legacyChecks[id]});$('#areasList').innerHTML='';(data.areas?.length?data.areas:[{matWallPlasterboard:true,matSkirting:true,matBasePlate:true}]).forEach(createArea);$('#equipmentList').innerHTML='';(data.equipment||[]).forEach(createEquipment);photos=Array.isArray(data.photos)?data.photos:[];logoData=data.logoData||CRSA_DEFAULT_LOGO;signatureData=data.signatureData||'';aiNarratives=data.aiNarratives&&typeof data.aiNarratives==='object'?data.aiNarratives:{};renderPhotos();updateAiControls();updateReportTypeUI(false);requestAnimationFrame(resizeSignature)}
    function saveNow(){try{localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(collectData()));$('#saveState').textContent='Saved locally';$('#saveState').style.background='rgba(255,255,255,.14)'}catch(e){$('#saveState').textContent='Storage full';$('#saveState').style.background='rgba(180,35,24,.7)'}}
    function queueSave(){$('#saveState').textContent='Saving…';clearTimeout(saveTimer);saveTimer=setTimeout(saveNow,450)}
    $('#reportForm').addEventListener('input',queueSave);$('#reportForm').addEventListener('change',queueSave);
    [
      ['dryRefWallPlasterboardValue','dryRefWallPlasterboard'],
      ['dryRefCeilingPlasterboardValue','dryRefCeilingPlasterboard'],
      ['dryRefCabinetryValue','dryRefCabinetry'],
      ['dryRefSkirtingValue','dryRefSkirting'],
      ['dryRefBasePlateValue','dryRefBasePlate'],
      ['dryRefConcreteValue','dryRefConcrete'],
      ['dryRefOtherValue','dryRefOther']
    ].forEach(([selectId,checkId])=>{
      document.getElementById(selectId)?.addEventListener('change',e=>{
        if(e.target.value)document.getElementById(checkId).checked=true;
        queueSave();
      });
    });

    function methodsText(){const map={methodVisual:'visual inspection',methodThermal:'thermal imaging',methodMoisture:'moisture-meter survey',methodOdour:'odour assessment',methodAir:'air and/or surface sampling',methodOther:'other testing'};const list=Object.keys(map).filter(id=>document.getElementById(id).checked).map(id=>map[id]);return list.length?list.join(', '):'a preliminary visual assessment'}
    function bulletise(text){const lines=text.split(/\n+/).map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean);return lines.length>1?`<ul>${lines.map(l=>`<li>${esc(l.replace(/^[-•\d.()\s]+/,''))}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`:`<p>${nl(text||'[To be completed]')}</p>`}

    function getSavedReports(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(REPORTS_KEY)||'[]')}catch{return[]}}
