    function setSavedReports(items){localStorage.setItem(REPORTS_KEY,JSON.stringify(items));updateSavedCount()}
    function updateSavedCount(){const c=getSavedReports().length;$('#savedCount').textContent=c}
    function reportLabel(data){return data?.fields?.jobNumber||data?.fields?.property||'Untitled report'}
    function saveSubmission(){
      const data=collectData(), reports=getSavedReports();
      const id=currentSubmissionId||data.submissionId||('r'+Date.now());
      currentSubmissionId=id;data.submissionId=id;data.submittedAt=new Date().toISOString();
      const idx=reports.findIndex(r=>r.submissionId===id);
      if(idx>=0)reports[idx]=data;else reports.unshift(data);
      setSavedReports(reports.slice(0,50));
      return id;
    }
    function renderSavedReports(){
      const list=$('#savedReportsList'), reports=getSavedReports();
      if(!reports.length){list.innerHTML='<div class="savedEmpty"><strong>No saved reports yet</strong><br>Generate a report to save it to this device.</div>';return}
      list.innerHTML=reports.map((r,i)=>{const d=r.fields||{},when=r.submittedAt||r.updated;return `<article class="savedCard"><div><h3>${esc(reportLabel(r))}</h3><p>${esc(d.reportType||'CRSA report')} · ${when?new Date(when).toLocaleString('en-AU'):'Date unavailable'}</p></div><div class="savedCardActions"><button type="button" class="loadSaved" data-index="${i}">Open</button><button type="button" class="deleteSaved" data-index="${i}">Delete</button></div></article>`}).join('');
      $$('.loadSaved').forEach(b=>b.onclick=()=>{applyData(reports[Number(b.dataset.index)]);saveNow();closeSavedModal();showStep(0);showToast('Saved report opened')});
      $$('.deleteSaved').forEach(b=>b.onclick=()=>{const index=Number(b.dataset.index);if(confirm('Delete this saved report from this device?')){reports.splice(index,1);setSavedReports(reports);renderSavedReports()}})
    }
    function openSavedModal(){renderSavedReports();$('#savedReportsModal').classList.add('show');$('#savedReportsModal').setAttribute('aria-hidden','false')}
    function closeSavedModal(){$('#savedReportsModal').classList.remove('show');$('#savedReportsModal').setAttribute('aria-hidden','true')}

    function checkedLabels(items){
      return items.filter(([id])=>document.getElementById(id)?.checked).map(([,label])=>label);
    }
    function selectedDryReferences(){
      const rows=[
        ['dryRefWallPlasterboard','dryRefWallPlasterboardValue','Wall plasterboard'],
        ['dryRefCeilingPlasterboard','dryRefCeilingPlasterboardValue','Ceiling plasterboard'],
        ['dryRefCabinetry','dryRefCabinetryValue','Cabinetry'],
        ['dryRefSkirting','dryRefSkirtingValue','Skirting board'],
        ['dryRefBasePlate','dryRefBasePlateValue','Timber base plate'],
        ['dryRefConcrete','dryRefConcreteValue','Concrete']
      ];
      const items=rows
        .filter(([checkId])=>document.getElementById(checkId)?.checked)
        .map(([,valueId,label])=>{
          const reading=val(valueId);
          return reading?`${label} — ${reading}`:label;
        });

      if($('#dryRefOther')?.checked){
        const material=val('dryRefOtherMaterial')||'Other material';
        const reading=val('dryRefOtherValue');
        items.push(reading?`${material} — ${reading}`:material);
      }
      return items;
    }

    function selectedMouldObservations(){
      const items=checkedLabels([
        ['mouldVisibleGrowth','Visible growth (Condition 3)'],
        ['mouldSettledSpores','Suspected settled spores (Condition 2)'],
        ['mouldMVOC','Microbial volatile organic compound (mVOC) odour']
      ]);
      if($('#mouldOther')?.checked&&val('mouldOtherText'))items.push(val('mouldOtherText'));
      if(val('mouldFindings'))items.push(val('mouldFindings'));
      return items;
    }
    function selectedQualifications(){
      const items=checkedLabels([
        ['qualWRT','IICRC WRT'],['qualAMRT','IICRC AMRT'],['qualFSRT','IICRC FSRT'],
        ['qualASD','IICRC ASD'],['qualCCT','IICRC CCT'],['qualOCT','IICRC OCT'],
        ['qualCDS','IICRC CDS'],['qualHST','IICRC HST'],['qualRRT','IICRC RRT'],
        ['qualCRT','IICRC CRT'],['qualMasterWater','IICRC Master Water Restorer'],
        ['qualMasterFire','IICRC Master Fire and Smoke Restorer'],
        ['qualMasterCleaning','IICRC Master Cleaning Technician'],
        ['qualRIAWLS','RIA Water Loss Specialist']
      ]);
      if($('#qualOther')?.checked&&val('qualOtherText'))items.push(val('qualOtherText'));
      return items;
    }
    function areaMaterialsList(a){
      const items=[];
      if(a.matWallPlasterboard)items.push('Wall plasterboard');
      if(a.matCeilingPlasterboard)items.push('Ceiling plasterboard');
      if(a.matCabinetry)items.push('Cabinetry');
      if(a.matSkirting)items.push('Skirting board');
      if(a.matBasePlate)items.push('Timber base plate');
      if(a.matOther&&a.materialsOther)items.push(a.materialsOther);
      if(a.materials)items.push(a.materials);
      return items;
    }
    function areaDamageList(a){
      const items=[];
      if(a.damageSwelling)items.push('Swelling');
      if(a.damageWaterStaining)items.push('Water staining');
      if(a.damageBubbling)items.push('Bubbling');
      if(a.damageSmokeSoot)items.push('Smoke and soot');
      if(a.damageVisualMicrobial)items.push('Visual microbial growth');
      if(a.damageSettledDust)items.push('Settled dust');
      if(a.damageOther&&a.damageOtherText)items.push(a.damageOtherText);
      if(a.findings)items.push(a.findings);
      return items;
    }
    function selectedImmediateActions(){
      const items=checkedLabels([
        ['actionContainment','Establish containment'],
        ['actionExtraction','Complete water extraction'],
        ['actionRemoveCarpet','Remove affected carpet'],
        ['actionRemoveUnderlay','Remove affected underlay'],
        ['actionRemoveSmoothEdge','Remove affected smooth edge'],
        ['actionRemovePlasterboard','Remove affected plasterboard'],
        ['actionRemoveSkirting','Remove affected skirting board'],
        ['actionRemoveBasePlate','Remove affected timber base plate'],
        ['actionHEPA','HEPA vacuum and clean'],
        ['actionAntimicrobial','Apply antimicrobial'],
        ['actionStabilisation','Environmental stabilisation'],
        ['actionDrying','Undertake structural drying'],
        ['actionMonitor','Monitor and document drying'],
        ['actionIEP','Hygienist / IEP assessment'],
        ['actionPRV','Post-remediation verification'],
        ['actionReinstate','Reinstate removed materials']
      ]);
      if($('#actionOther')?.checked && val('immediateActionsOther'))items.push(val('immediateActionsOther'));
      if(val('immediateActions'))items.push(val('immediateActions'));
      return items;
    }
    function selectedScope(){
      const items=checkedLabels([
        ['scopeContainment','Establish containment'],['scopeExtraction','Complete water extraction'],
        ['scopeRemoveCarpet','Remove affected carpet'],['scopeRemoveUnderlay','Remove affected underlay'],
        ['scopeRemoveSmoothEdge','Remove affected smooth edge'],['scopeRemovePlasterboard','Remove affected plasterboard'],
        ['scopeRemoveSkirting','Remove affected skirting board'],['scopeRemoveBasePlate','Remove affected timber base plate'],
        ['scopeHEPA','HEPA vacuum and clean retained surfaces'],['scopeAntimicrobial','Apply antimicrobial treatment'],
        ['scopeStabilisation','Environmental stabilisation'],['scopeDrying','Undertake structural drying'],['scopeMonitor','Monitor and document drying conditions'],
        ['scopeIEP','Obtain hygienist / IEP assessment'],['scopePRV','Complete post-remediation verification'],
        ['scopeReinstate','Reinstate removed materials']
      ]);
      if($('#scopeOther')?.checked && val('scopeOtherText'))items.push(val('scopeOtherText'));
      if(val('scope'))items.push(val('scope'));
      return items;
    }
    function dehumidifierInstallationNarrative(){
      if(!$('#eqDehumidifiers')?.checked)return '';
      const entered=parseInt(val('qtyDehumidifiers'),10);
      const qty=Number.isFinite(entered)&&entered>0?entered:1;
      const equipmentName=qty===1?'dehumidifier':'dehumidifiers';
      const verb=qty===1?'has':'have';
      return `${qty} ${equipmentName} ${verb} been installed to control the evaporation load within the environment.`;
    }

    function fixedEquipment(){
      const rows=[
        ['eqAirMovers','qtyAirMovers','Air mover'],
        ['eqDehumidifiers','qtyDehumidifiers','Dehumidifier'],
        ['eqAFD','qtyAFD','Air filtration device'],
        ['eqRCD','qtyRCD','RCD'],
        ['eqPowerLeads','qtyPowerLeads','Power lead']
      ];
      return rows.filter(([c])=>document.getElementById(c)?.checked).map(([c,q,type])=>({type,qty:val(q)||'1',area:'',notes:''}));
    }

    function setAiStatus(message,type='info'){
      const box=$('#aiStatus');
      if(!box)return;
      box.textContent=message||'';
      box.classList.toggle('show',!!message);
      box.style.borderLeftColor=type==='error'?'#b42318':type==='success'?'#087443':'var(--blue)';
      box.style.background=type==='error'?'#fff1f0':type==='success'?'#ecfdf3':'#eef8fd';
      box.style.color=type==='error'?'#7a271a':type==='success'?'#075e45':'#173f5f';
    }

    function updateAiControls(){
      const hasAi=aiNarratives&&Object.values(aiNarratives).some(v=>typeof v==='string'&&v.trim());
      if($('#aiClearBtn'))$('#aiClearBtn').hidden=!hasAi;
    }

    function applicableStandards(){
      const standards=[];
      const focus=reportFocusValue().toLowerCase();

      if(/water/.test(focus))standards.push('AS-IICRC S500:2025');
      if(/mould|microbial/.test(focus))standards.push('AS-IICRC S520:2025');
      if(/fire|smoke/.test(focus))standards.push('ANSI/IICRC S700:2025');

      const areas=collectAreas();
      const joined=[
        val('lossType'),val('source'),val('category'),val('lossClass'),
        ...areas.flatMap(a=>[
          a.findings,a.damageOtherText,a.readings,
          a.damageWaterStaining?'water staining':'',
          a.damageSwelling?'swelling':'',
          a.damageBubbling?'bubbling':'',
          a.damageSmokeSoot?'smoke soot':'',
          a.damageVisualMicrobial?'microbial growth':''
        ]),
        ...selectedMouldObservations()
      ].join(' ').toLowerCase();

      const add=standard=>{if(!standards.includes(standard))standards.push(standard)};
      if(/water|flood|sewage|moisture|wet|leak|escape of liquid|category [123]|class [1234]/i.test(joined)
        || $('#eqDehumidifiers')?.checked || $('#eqAirMovers')?.checked || $('#actionExtraction')?.checked)add('AS-IICRC S500:2025');
      if(/mould|mold|microbial|spore|mvoc/i.test(joined)||selectedMouldObservations().length>0)add('AS-IICRC S520:2025');
      if(/fire|smoke|soot|combustion|odour residue/i.test(joined))add('ANSI/IICRC S700:2025');
      return standards;
    }

    function standardReferenceText(){
      const standards=applicableStandards();
      if(!standards.length)return '';
      const joined=standards.length===1
        ?standards[0]
        :standards.length===2
          ?`${standards[0]} and ${standards[1]}`
          :`${standards.slice(0,-1).join(', ')} and ${standards.at(-1)}`;
      return `This report has been prepared with reference to ${joined}, where applicable to the services performed and the conditions observed. Reference to these standards does not, by itself, assert compliance with every provision or any specific clause.`;
    }

    function reportTypePreamble(){
      const type=val('reportType');
      const standards=applicableStandards();
      const joined=standards.length===1
        ?standards[0]
        :standards.length===2
          ?`${standards[0]} and ${standards[1]}`
          :standards.length
            ?`${standards.slice(0,-1).join(', ')} and ${standards.at(-1)}`
            :'relevant industry standards';

      if(type==='Mould Assessment Report'){
        return `This mould assessment report has been prepared with reference to AS-IICRC S520:2025, Standard for Professional Mould Remediation, together with other relevant industry standards and accepted professional practice. It records the conditions observed at the time of attendance, the work completed and any recommendations arising from the assessment. Reference to the standard does not, by itself, represent certification of compliance with every provision.`;
      }
      if(type==='Water Damage Report'){
        return `This water damage report has been prepared with reference to AS-IICRC S500:2025, Standard for Professional Water Damage Restoration, together with other relevant industry standards and accepted professional practice. It records the conditions observed at the time of attendance, the restoration activities completed and the recommendations current at that time. Reference to the standard does not, by itself, represent certification of compliance with every provision.`;
      }
      if(type==='Fire and Smoke Damage Report'){
        return `This fire and smoke damage report has been prepared with reference to ANSI/IICRC S700:2025, Standard for Professional Fire and Smoke Damage Restoration, together with other relevant industry standards and accepted professional practice. It records the conditions observed at the time of attendance, the restoration activities completed and the recommendations current at that time. Reference to the standard does not, by itself, represent certification of compliance with every provision.`;
      }
      if(type==='Re-attendance Report'){
        return `This re-attendance report should be read together with the original CRSA report and job records. It documents the condition of the affected environment, monitoring results and restoration activities observed or completed during the return attendance. The report has been prepared with reference to ${joined}, where applicable, together with other relevant industry standards and accepted professional practice.`;
      }
      return `This initial assessment report has been prepared to document the conditions observed at the time of attendance and assist with determining appropriate restoration actions. It has been prepared with reference to ${joined}, where applicable, together with other relevant industry standards and accepted professional practice.`;
    }

    function programmedIntroduction(){
      const type=val('reportType');
      if(type==='Re-attendance Report'){
        return `CRSA re-attended in relation to job number ${esc(val('jobNumber')||'[job number not provided]')}${val('instructions')?' for the purpose of '+esc(val('instructions')):''}. The re-attendance included ${esc(methodsText())} to document the current condition, review work completed and identify any further action required.`;
      }
      return `Further to the instructions received${val('instructions')?' ('+esc(val('instructions'))+')':''}, a CRSA technician attended the reported property to conduct a ${esc(type.toLowerCase())}. The assessment included ${esc(methodsText())} to identify observable damage, document restoration activities and assist with preparation of recommendations and a proposed scope of works.`;
    }

    function collectAIReportPayload(){
      const equipment=[...fixedEquipment(),...collectEquipment().filter(e=>e.type||e.qty||e.area||e.notes)];
      return {
        report_type:val('reportType'),
        report_focus:reportFocusValue(),
        is_reattendance:isReattendance(),
        job:{
          job_number:val('jobNumber'),
          property_or_claim_reference:val('property'),
          insured_or_client:val('insured'),
          insurer:val('insurer'),
          claim_number:val('claim'),
          work_order_number:val('workOrder'),
          building_type:val('buildingType'),
          attendance_date:val('date'),
          attending_technician:val('tech')
        },
        cause_and_classification:{
          type_of_loss:val('lossType'),
          reported_date_of_loss:val('dateLoss'),
          reported_source_and_cause:val('source'),
          source_status:val('sourceStatus'),
          category:val('category'),
          class:val('lossClass'),
          inspection_methods:methodsText()
        },
        affected_areas:collectAreas(),
        moisture_survey:{
          unaffected_area:val('unaffectedArea'),
          dry_reference_materials:selectedDryReferences(),
          non_invasive_readings:val('nonInvasiveReadings'),
          dry_reference_notes:val('dryReference'),
          elevated_readings:val('elevatedReadings')
        },
        mould_microbials:{
          selected_observations:selectedMouldObservations(),
          additional_notes:val('mouldFindings')
        },
        contents_observations:val('contents'),
        pre_existing_damage:val('preExisting'),
        inspection_limitations:val('limitations'),
        actions_completed:selectedImmediateActions(),
        equipment_installed:equipment,
        quantity_format_requirement:'Use numerals for all quantities, for example 3 dehumidifiers, not three dehumidifiers.',
        monitoring_and_drying_notes:val('monitoring'),
        recommendations_and_proposed_scope:selectedScope(),
        specialist_assessment:val('specialist'),
        overall_recommendation:val('recommendation'),
        current_conclusion:val('conclusion'),
        applicable_standard_names:applicableStandards()
      };
    }

    function aiParagraph(key){
      const text=aiNarratives?.[key];
      return typeof text==='string'&&text.trim()?`<p class="aiNarrative">${nl(text)}</p>`:'';
    }

    async function improveReportWithAI(){
      const endpoint=$('#aiEndpoint')?.value.trim()||localStorage.getItem(AI_ENDPOINT_KEY)||'';
      const accessCode=$('#aiAccessCode')?.value||localStorage.getItem(AI_ACCESS_KEY)||'';
      if(!endpoint){
        setAiStatus('Enter the secure AI service URL under AI wording setup before using this feature.','error');
        showToast('AI service URL required');
        return;
      }

      localStorage.setItem(AI_ENDPOINT_KEY,endpoint);
      if(accessCode)localStorage.setItem(AI_ACCESS_KEY,accessCode);

      buildReport();
      const button=$('#aiImproveBtn');
      const originalText=button.textContent;
      button.disabled=true;
      button.textContent='Improving wording…';
      setAiStatus('The AI is improving the wording. Recorded facts, quantities and classifications will be preserved.','info');

      try{
        const headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'};
        if(accessCode)headers['X-CRSA-Access-Code']=accessCode;
        const response=await fetch(endpoint,{
          method:'POST',
          headers,
          body:JSON.stringify({report:collectAIReportPayload()})
        });
        const data=await response.json().catch(()=>({}));
        if(!response.ok)throw new Error(data.error||`AI service returned ${response.status}`);
        if(!data.narratives||typeof data.narratives!=='object')throw new Error('The AI service returned an invalid response.');

        const allowed=[
          'introduction','cause_and_classification','inspection_findings','moisture_summary',
          'mould_observations','pre_existing_and_limitations','actions_completed',
          'equipment_installed','recommendations','conclusion','standards_note'
        ];
        aiNarratives={};
        allowed.forEach(key=>{
          if(typeof data.narratives[key]==='string'&&data.narratives[key].trim()){
            aiNarratives[key]=data.narratives[key].trim();
          }
        });

        updateAiControls();
        buildReport();
        saveNow();
        saveSubmission();
        setAiStatus('AI wording has been applied. Review every statement before printing, sharing or issuing the report.','success');
        showToast('AI wording applied');
      }catch(error){
        console.error(error);
        setAiStatus(`AI wording could not be completed: ${error.message}`,'error');
        showToast('AI wording failed');
      }finally{
        button.disabled=false;
        button.textContent=originalText;
      }
    }

    function buildReport(){
      const missing=[];
      if(!val('jobNumber'))missing.push('CRSA job number');
      if(!isReattendance()&&!val('property'))missing.push('property address / claim reference');
      if(!val('date'))missing.push('attendance date');
      if(!val('tech'))missing.push('technician');
      if(!isReattendance()&&!val('source'))missing.push('reported source / cause');if(!collectAreas().some(a=>
        a.name||a.findings||a.materials||a.materialsOther||
        a.matWallPlasterboard||a.matCeilingPlasterboard||a.matCabinetry||a.matSkirting||a.matBasePlate||a.matOther||
        a.damageSwelling||a.damageWaterStaining||a.damageBubbling||a.damageSmokeSoot||a.damageVisualMicrobial||a.damageSettledDust||a.damageOther||
        a.moistureTaken||a.moistureStandard||a.readings
      ))missing.push('inspection findings');if(!selectedScope().length)missing.push('recommended scope');if(val('category')==='3'&&!/hygien|iep|protocol|prv|verification/i.test(selectedScope().join(' ')+' '+val('specialist')+' '+val('recommendation')))missing.push('Category 3 hygienist / IEP / PRV consideration');
      const alert=$('#alert');alert.classList.toggle('show',missing.length>0);alert.textContent=missing.length?'Items to confirm before issue: '+missing.join('; ')+'.':'';
      const areas=collectAreas().filter(a=>
        a.name||a.materials||a.materialsOther||
        a.matWallPlasterboard||a.matCeilingPlasterboard||a.matCabinetry||a.matSkirting||a.matBasePlate||a.matOther||
        a.damageSwelling||a.damageWaterStaining||a.damageBubbling||a.damageSmokeSoot||a.damageVisualMicrobial||a.damageSettledDust||a.damageOther||a.damageOtherText||
        a.findings||a.moistureTaken||a.moistureStandard||a.readings
      );const equipment=[...fixedEquipment(),...collectEquipment().filter(e=>e.type||e.qty||e.area||e.notes)];
      const attendanceText=`${formatDate(val('date'))}${val('arrival')?' at '+val('arrival'):''}${val('departure')?' to '+val('departure'):''}`;
      const fullMeta=[['CRSA job number',val('jobNumber')],['Property / claim reference',val('property')],['Insured / client',val('insured')],['Insurance claim number',val('claim')],['Insurer / referring client',val('insurer')],['Work order number',val('workOrder')],['Building type',val('buildingType')],['Attendance',attendanceText],['Attending technician',val('tech')],['Client in attendance',val('clientAttendance')]];
      const reattendanceMeta=[['CRSA job number',val('jobNumber')],['Report relates to',reportFocusValue()],['Re-attendance',attendanceText],['Attending technician',val('tech')],['Client in attendance',val('clientAttendance')]];
      const meta=isReattendance()?reattendanceMeta:fullMeta;
      const reportType=val('reportType').toUpperCase();
      const brand=nl(val('businessDetails')).split('<br>');
      const intro=programmedIntroduction();
      const areaHtml=areas.length?areas.map((a,i)=>{
        const mats=areaMaterialsList(a);
        const damage=areaDamageList(a);
        const moisture=[];
        if(a.moistureTaken)moisture.push('Moisture readings taken');
        if(a.moistureStandard)moisture.push(a.moistureStandard);
        if(a.readings)moisture.push(a.readings);
        return `<h3>${i+1}. ${esc(a.name||'Affected area')}</h3>
          ${mats.length?`<p><strong>Materials / construction:</strong> ${nl(mats.join('; '))}</p>`:''}
          ${damage.length?`<p><strong>Observed damage / condition:</strong> ${nl(damage.join('; '))}</p>`:''}
          ${moisture.length?`<p><strong>Moisture readings:</strong> ${nl(moisture.join('; '))}</p>`:''}`;
      }).join(''):'<p>[Inspection findings to be completed]</p>';
      const eqHtml=equipment.length?`<ul>${equipment.map(e=>`<li>${esc(e.qty||'1')} × ${esc(e.type)}${e.area?' — '+esc(e.area):''}${e.notes?' ('+esc(e.notes)+')':''}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`:'<p>No equipment recorded as installed.</p>';
      const photosHtml=photos.length?`<h2>7.0 PHOTOGRAPHS</h2><div class="reportPhotos">${photos.map((p,i)=>`<figure class="reportPhoto"><img src="${p.src}" alt="Inspection photograph ${i+1}"><figcaption><strong>Photograph ${i+1}:</strong> ${esc(p.caption||'No caption entered')}</figcaption></figure>`).join('')}</div>${val('photoNotes')?`<p>${nl(val('photoNotes'))}</p>`:''}`:'';
      const sigHtml=signatureData?`<img class="reportSignature" src="${signatureData}" alt="Technician signature">`:'';
      const logo=logoData?`<img class="reportLogo" src="${logoData}" alt="CRSA logo">`:`<div class="brandMark reportLogo" style="display:grid;font-family:Arial">CRSA</div>`;
      const category=val('category')?(val('category')==='Unconfirmed'?'Unconfirmed':'Category '+val('category')):'Not recorded / not applicable';const cls=val('lossClass')?(val('lossClass')==='Unconfirmed'?'Unconfirmed':'Class '+val('lossClass')):'Not recorded / not applicable';
      const html=`<div class="reportHeader">${logo}<div class="reportBrand"><h1>${brand[0]||'Cleaning & Restoration Services Australia'}</h1><p>${brand.slice(1).join('<br>')}</p></div></div>
        <div class="reportTitle">${esc(reportType)}</div>
        <table class="reportMeta"><tbody>${meta.map(([k,v])=>`<tr><th>${esc(k)}</th><td>${nl(v||'[Not provided]')}</td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table>
        <div class="standardPreamble"><strong>Report basis and industry references</strong>${nl(reportTypePreamble())}</div>
        ${aiNarratives.introduction?aiParagraph('introduction'):`<p>${intro}</p>`}
        <h2>1.0 ${isReattendance()?'RE-ATTENDANCE BACKGROUND':'CAUSE OF LOSS AND CLASSIFICATION'}</h2>
        <p><strong>Type of loss:</strong> ${esc(val('lossType')||'Not confirmed')}</p><p><strong>Reported date of loss:</strong> ${esc(formatDate(val('dateLoss'))||'Not provided')}</p><p><strong>${isReattendance()?'Previous loss / reported cause':'Reported source and cause'}:</strong> ${nl(val('source')||(isReattendance()?'Refer to the original job file.':'[To be confirmed]'))}</p><p><strong>Source status:</strong> ${esc(val('sourceStatus'))}</p>${usesWaterWorkflow()?`<p><strong>Water damage classification:</strong> ${esc(category)}; ${esc(cls)}.</p>`:''}
        ${aiParagraph('cause_and_classification')}
        <h2>2.0 INSPECTION FINDINGS</h2>${areaHtml}${aiParagraph('inspection_findings')}
        <h3>Moisture survey summary</h3>
        <p><strong>Unaffected area:</strong> ${nl(val('unaffectedArea')||'Not recorded.')}</p>
        ${selectedDryReferences().length?`<p><strong>Dry reference materials:</strong></p><ul>${selectedDryReferences().map(x=>`<li>${esc(x)}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`:'<p><strong>Dry reference materials:</strong> Not recorded.</p>'}
        <p><strong>Non-invasive readings:</strong> ${nl(val('nonInvasiveReadings')||'Not recorded.')}</p>
        <p><strong>Additional dry-reference notes:</strong> ${nl(val('dryReference')||'Not recorded.')}</p>
        <p><strong>Elevated readings:</strong> ${nl(val('elevatedReadings')||'Not recorded.')}</p>
        ${aiParagraph('moisture_summary')}
        ${selectedMouldObservations().length?`<h3>Mould / microbial observations</h3><ul>${selectedMouldObservations().map(x=>`<li>${nl(x)}</li>`).join('')}</ul>${aiParagraph('mould_observations')}`:aiParagraph('mould_observations')}${val('contents')?`<h3>Contents observations</h3><p>${nl(val('contents'))}</p>`:''}
        <h2>3.0 PRE-EXISTING DAMAGE AND LIMITATIONS</h2><p>${nl(val('preExisting')||'No pre-existing damage was identified during this preliminary inspection unless otherwise noted in this report.')}</p><p><strong>Inspection limitations:</strong> ${nl(val('limitations')||'Findings were limited to areas that were visible and accessible at the time of attendance. Concealed conditions may differ.')}</p>
        ${aiParagraph('pre_existing_and_limitations')}
        <h2>4.0 ACTIONS COMPLETED</h2>${selectedImmediateActions().length?`<ul>${selectedImmediateActions().map(x=>`<li>${nl(x)}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`:'<p>No immediate restoration actions were recorded within this report.</p>'}${aiParagraph('actions_completed')}
        <h3>Equipment installed</h3>${eqHtml}${dehumidifierInstallationNarrative()?`<p>${esc(dehumidifierInstallationNarrative())}</p>`:''}${aiParagraph('equipment_installed')}${val('monitoring')?`<h3>Monitoring / drying notes</h3><p>${nl(val('monitoring'))}</p>`:''}
        <h2>5.0 RECOMMENDATIONS / PROPOSED SCOPE OF WORKS</h2>${selectedScope().length?`<ul>${selectedScope().map(x=>`<li>${nl(x)}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`:'<p>[Recommended scope to be completed]</p>'}${val('specialist')?`<h3>Further specialist assessment</h3><p>${nl(val('specialist'))}</p>`:''}${val('recommendation')?`<h3>Overall recommendation</h3><p>${nl(val('recommendation'))}</p>`:''}${aiParagraph('recommendations')}
        <h2>6.0 CONCLUSION</h2><p>${nl(aiNarratives.conclusion||val('conclusion')||'The proposed scope and recommendations are based on conditions observable at the time of inspection. Concealed damage, ongoing moisture ingress, hazardous materials or additional affected areas identified during works may require further assessment, authority and variation. Liability and policy coverage remain subject to insurer determination.')}</p>
        ${(aiNarratives.standards_note||standardReferenceText())?`<div class="aiReference"><strong>Applicable industry references:</strong><br>${nl(aiNarratives.standards_note||standardReferenceText())}</div>`:''}
        ${photosHtml}
        <h2>${photos.length?'8.0':'7.0'} REPORT SIGN-OFF</h2>${sigHtml}<p><strong>${esc(val('authorName')||val('tech')||'[Report author]')}</strong><br>${esc(val('authorTitle')||'Cleaning & Restoration Services Australia')}<br>Report date: ${esc(formatDate(val('reportDate'))||formatDate(today()))}</p>
        ${selectedQualifications().length?`<h3>Technician qualifications</h3><ul>${selectedQualifications().map(x=>`<li>${esc(x)}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`:''}
        <div class="disclaimer">This report records observations made within accessible areas at the time of attendance. It is not a structural, electrical, plumbing, asbestos or indoor environmental certification unless expressly stated. Any draft text must be reviewed and approved by the report author before issue.</div>`;
      $('#report').innerHTML=html;lastReportText=$('#report').innerText;queueSave();return html;
    }
    function openPreview(){if(!validateStep(currentStep)&&currentStep===5)return;buildReport();saveSubmission();$('#previewPanel').classList.add('mobileShow');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';setTimeout(()=>$('#previewPanel').scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'}),50);showToast('Report saved to this device')}
    $('#generateBtn').onclick=openPreview;
    $('#reportType').addEventListener('change',()=>updateReportTypeUI(true));
    $('#reportFocus').addEventListener('change',()=>updateReportTypeUI(false));
    $('#lossType').addEventListener('change',toggleConditionals);
    $('#aiImproveBtn').onclick=improveReportWithAI;
    $('#aiClearBtn').onclick=()=>{
      aiNarratives={};
      updateAiControls();
      buildReport();
      saveNow();
      setAiStatus('Original programmed wording restored.','success');
      showToast('Original wording restored');
    };
    $('#aiEndpoint').addEventListener('change',e=>localStorage.setItem(AI_ENDPOINT_KEY,e.target.value.trim()));
    $('#aiAccessCode').addEventListener('change',e=>{
      if(e.target.value)localStorage.setItem(AI_ACCESS_KEY,e.target.value);
      else localStorage.removeItem(AI_ACCESS_KEY);
    });
    $('#mobileBackBtn').onclick=()=>showStep(currentStep-1);
    $('#mobileNextBtn').onclick=()=>{if(currentStep===5){openPreview()}else if(validateStep())showStep(currentStep+1)};
    $('#mobileSaveBtn').onclick=()=>{saveNow();showToast('Draft saved on this device')};
    $('#saveDraftTop').onclick=()=>{saveNow();showToast('Draft saved on this device')};
    $('#savedReportsBtn').onclick=openSavedModal;$('#closeSavedReports').onclick=closeSavedModal;$('#closeSavedReportsBottom').onclick=closeSavedModal;
    $('#savedReportsModal').onclick=e=>{if(e.target===$('#savedReportsModal'))closeSavedModal()};
    $('#closePreviewBtn').onclick=()=>{$('#previewPanel').classList.remove('mobileShow');document.body.style.overflow='';showStep(currentStep)};
    $('#printBtn').onclick=()=>{buildReport();window.print()};
    $('#copyBtn').onclick=async()=>{buildReport();try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(lastReportText);showToast('Report text copied')}catch{showToast('Copy unavailable in this browser')}};
    $('#shareBtn').onclick=async()=>{buildReport();const title=`${val('jobNumber')||'CRSA'} — ${val('reportType')}`;if(navigator.share){try{await navigator.share({title,text:lastReportText})}catch(e){if(e.name!=='AbortError')showToast('Could not share report')}}else{try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(lastReportText);showToast('Sharing unavailable — text copied')}catch{showToast('Sharing unavailable')}}};
    $('#exportBtn').onclick=()=>{const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(collectData(),null,2)],{type:'application/json'}),a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download=`${(val('jobNumber')||'CRSA-report').replace(/[^a-z0-9-_]+/gi,'-')}.json`;a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);showToast('Draft exported')};
    $('#importBtn').onclick=()=>$('#importFile').click();$('#importFile').onchange=async e=>{const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;try{const data=JSON.parse(await f.text());applyData(data);saveNow();showToast('Draft imported')}catch{showToast('Invalid draft file')}e.target.value=''};
    $('#newBtn').onclick=()=>{if(!confirm('Start a new report? This clears the current draft but keeps saved reports.'))return;localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);document.body.style.overflow='';location.reload()};

    window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{clearTimeout(window.__sigResize);window.__sigResize=setTimeout(resizeSignature,180)});
    $('#lossType').addEventListener('change',()=>{toggleConditionals();queueSave()});
    window.addEventListener('beforeunload',saveNow);
    if('serviceWorker' in navigator&&location.protocol.startsWith('http'))navigator.serviceWorker.register('sw.js').catch(()=>{});
    (function init(){
      $('#aiEndpoint').value=localStorage.getItem(AI_ENDPOINT_KEY)||'';
      $('#aiAccessCode').value=localStorage.getItem(AI_ACCESS_KEY)||'';
      updateAiControls();
      if(!val('date'))$('#date').value=today();if(!val('reportDate'))$('#reportDate').value=today();
      const raw=localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);if(raw){try{applyData(JSON.parse(raw))}catch{createArea({matWallPlasterboard:true,matSkirting:true,matBasePlate:true})}}else{createArea({matWallPlasterboard:true,matSkirting:true,matBasePlate:true})}
      if(!$('#areasList').children.length)createArea({matWallPlasterboard:true,matSkirting:true,matBasePlate:true});
      if(!val('reportType'))$('#reportType').value='Initial Assessment Report';
      if(!val('reportFocus'))$('#reportFocus').value='Water damage';
      updateReportTypeUI(false);
      resizeSignature();updateSavedCount();toggleConditionals();showStep(0);
    })();
  </script>
</body>
</html>
